protocol: eval/run_eval.py::arm_claudecode (claudecode_opus_skill arm), issue items use the same harness with an answer prompt
caveat: Runs against post-merge main (same as the original claudecode_opus_skill arm). For merged PRs / closed issues the fix exists in repo history and answers may cite it — score closed items as repo-knowledge tasks, or re-run pinned to pre-merge SHAs for blind scoring.
